title: MD
biography: John Gibbon was an American surgeon who invented the heart-lung machine, making open-heart surgery possible. In 1953, he performed the first successful open-heart operation using cardiopulmonary bypass.
aiSummary: John Gibbon is a cardiac surgery specialist at Jefferson Medical College. Based in Philadelphia.

timeline.title: First open-heart surgery with heart-lung machine
timeline.description: Successfully repaired an atrial septal defect using his cardiopulmonary bypass machine

timeline.title: Began developing heart-lung machine
timeline.description: Started two decades of work to create a machine that could temporarily replace heart and lung function
